name: wp_update_bricks_template
description: Update a Bricks builder template or a page's Bricks layout on the client's STAGING site. Staging-autonomous write — runtime resolves and enforces the staging target; global-class/variable edits should be made cautiously as they cascade site-wide.
api: WordPress REST API + Bricks meta (_bricks_page_content_2 et al.)

site_ref.description: per-client STAGING site handle from clients/<client>/binding

template_ref.description: Bricks template id or the page id whose Bricks layout is edited

bricks_data.description: the Bricks element/content structure to write
